name: pagination
description: APG navigation landmark with numbered page controls. Real <a href> per page (URL mode) or <button> elements with data-page (wire mode). Sliding-window algorithm with ellipsis gaps; prev/next; optional total summary, page-size switcher, quick jumper, simple mode. aria-current='page' on active page; aria-label required on the nav landmark. Zero client state: currentPage, totalPages, and baseUrl are all server facts passed as typed @params.
docs: Copies the pagination partial to your JTE root at lievit/pagination.jte. Pass currentPage (1-based, required), totalPages (required; 0 or 1 renders nothing), and either baseUrl (URL mode: emits real <a href> links, Turbo Drive ready) or omit it for wire mode (emits <button type='button'> with data-page on each item; wire the action via pageAttrs='l:click="goToPage"'). Requires the icon partial (chevron-left, chevron-right, ellipsis) and native-select partial (when showSizeSwitcher=true). Size sm/md/lg aligns flush with button/input in a toolbar row. Optional: showTotal (total-items live region), showSizeSwitcher (page-size native-select), showJumper (go-to-page form), simple (prev/next + fraction, no numbered list). The source is yours: edit freely.
